note_text:
Patient: 40M presenting with treatment-resistant severe recurrent depression.
Conservative management including beta-blockers, antiarrhythmic medication was attempted over approximately 15 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring psychiatry physician requests authorization for transcranial magnetic stimulation.

Patient: 46F presenting with refractory severe recurrent depression.
Conservative management including corticosteroid injection was attempted over approximately 1 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring psychiatry physician requests authorization for transcranial magnetic stimulation.

Patient: 50F presenting with refractory severe recurrent depression.
Conservative management including antiarrhythmic medication was attempted over approximately 22 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with severe recurrent depression.
Referring psychiatry physician requests authorization for transcranial magnetic stimulation.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with severe recurrent depression

note_text:
Patient: 42F presenting with severe treatment-resistant depression.
Conservative management including antiarrhythmic medication, disease-modifying medication was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring psychiatry physician requests authorization for electroconvulsive therapy.
